Task: task-3

- Created docs/tool-inventory.md with comprehensive tool inventory
- Cataloged 15+ scripts and tools across validation, sync, release, automation
- Maturity assessment: 5 categories rated (High/Medium/Low)

Key findings:
- Plugin validation (validate-plugins.mjs) is mature with AJV schemas
- Release automation is fully integrated with semantic-release
- Link checking (lychee) exists but is manual
- Documentation linting (markdown, CLAUDE.md) is a gap

Created docs/tool-inventory.md - comprehensive tool inventory documenting 15+ scripts/tools with maturity assessment (5 categories rated High/Medium/Low). Identified 7 gaps: no markdown linting, no CLAUDE.md validators, no SKILL.md schema enforcement. Release automation is mature; link checking and plugin enablement are manual.
